feedback.text: I would like to have protections against companies destroying their products that they have already sold to customers, in particular, video games. Take The Crew by Ubisoft for example. The Crew was released in 2014 and Ubisoft shut its servers down in 2024 rendering it unplayable. I believe customers should have the right to be able to play video games they have purchased, even after the developers have shut down its servers.
